zh.Sully-la-Chapelle, Centre-Val de Loire,: 法國崔洛易特素利-拉-查阿培勒
zh.Milly-la-Forêt, Évry, Essonne, Île-de-Fr: 法國i萊-德-福朗斯艾頌艾福利米利-拉-福e特
zh.lifeSummary: 當Marguerite de Milly la Forêt於1255年出生在法國i萊-德-福朗斯艾頌艾福利米利-拉-福e特時，她的父親Geoffroy de Milly42歲，母親Eléonore de Sancerre37歲。她於1270年與Eudes de Sully III在法國i萊-德-福朗斯艾頌艾福利米利-拉-福e特結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1286年享年31歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Marguerite de Milly la Forêt于1255年出生在法国i萊-德-福朗斯艾頌艾福利米利-拉-福e特时，她的父亲Geoffroy de Milly42岁，母亲Eléonore de Sancerre37岁。她于1270年与Eudes de Sully III在法国i萊-德-福朗斯艾頌艾福利米利-拉-福e特结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1286年享年31岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Milly
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of   Willey  .
Americanized form of German   Willi  .

variants.name: Willey
meanings: English: from a pet form of the personal name   Will  , a short form of   William  . In some instances a variant of   Wiley  .
Americanized form of Swiss German   Willi  .

History: Isaac Willey is recorded in Boston, MA, in 1640, and went on to be one of the founders of New London, CT. His descendent Samuel Hopkins Willey (1821–1914) was one of the founders of the College of California at Berkeley in 1860.

nameMeanings.name: la
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Hung, Cuong, Anh, Thanh, Ha, Hoang, Tuan, Chau, Hao, Hien, Hoa, Hue, Nam, Phong, Sinh, Tuong, Min, Tam, Tanh, Thai, Tham, Tinh, Yeong.  Chinese Hong, Hang, Sang, Tong, Chan, Chi, Hwa Ja, Hyung, Kam, Ki Bong, Kin, Man.
Vietnamese: from the Chinese surname 羅, see   Luo   1.
Vietnamese (Lã): from the Chinese surname 呂, see Lu 6 and 3 below.

variants.name: Luo
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Wei, Jian, Yi, Ping, Yong, Zhen, Feng, Hong, Ming, Jin, Bin, Chen, Hai, Lan, Min, Huan, Hung, Shen, Tian.
Chinese:

Mandarin form of the surname 羅, meaning ‘net for catching birds’ or ‘to collect’ in Chinese: (i) from Luo (羅), the name of an ancient state (located in present-day Hubei province). After it was annexed by the state of Chu during the early Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ), people from the state migrated southwards and adopted Luo (羅) as their surname. (ii) from the Po Duo Luo (破多羅) and Chi Luo (叱羅) families from the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China, who changed their original surnames to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iii) from the personal name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅), leader of an ancient Turkic tribe who are believed to have migrated to China during the Tang dynasty (618–907  AD ). His descendants inherited his name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅) as their surname and shortened it to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iv) from the name of one of the seven families from the Bandun Man, an ethnic group residing in ancient southwestern China (located mainly in present-day Sichuan province).

nameMeanings.name: Forêt
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Alain, Alcide, Antoine, Camille, Emile, Anatole, Armand, Chantal, Clemile, Clovis, Gillis.
French (Forêt): variant of Forest ‘forest’ and, in North America, (also) an altered form of this.

variants.name: Forest
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Pascal, Amie, Armand, Bertice, Etienne, Fernand, Germaine, Jacques, Normand, Sylvain.

French: topographic name for someone who lived in or near a royal forest, or a metonymic occupational name for a keeper or worker in one, from Old French forest ‘forest’; or a habitational name from (La) Forest, the name of several places in various parts of France. Unlike modern French forêt, forest was not simply a word for extensive woodland, but referred specifically to large wooded areas reserved by law for the king and his nobles to hunt in (see also English Forrest ). Compare Deforest and Laforest .
English and Scottish: variant of   Forrest  , a cognate of 1 above.

nameMeanings.name: Marguerite
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of Margaret , also used in the English-speaking world, where its use has been reinforced by the fact that the name was adopted in the 19th century for a garden flower, a large cultivated variety of daisy. Margaret was earlier used in English as a dialect word denoting the ox-eye daisy, and the French equivalent was borrowed into English just in time to catch the vogue for deriving girls' names from vocabulary words denoting flowers. See also Daisy .

en.lifeSummary: When Marguerite de Milly la Forêt was born in 1255, in Milly-la-Forêt, Évry, Essonne, Île-de-France, France, her father, Geoffroy de Milly, was 42 and her mother, Eléonore de Sancerre, was 37. She married Eudes de Sully III in 1270, in Milly-la-Forêt, Évry, Essonne, Île-de-France, France. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1286, at the age of 31.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Marguerite de Milly la Forêt est née en 1255, à Milly-la-Forêt, Évry, Essonne, Île-de-France, France, son père, Geoffroy de Milly, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Eléonore de Sancerre, avait 37 ans. Elle a épousé Eudes de Sully III en 1270, à Milly-la-Forêt, Évry, Essonne, Île-de-France, France. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1286, à l’âge de 31 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Marguerite de Milly la Forêt 1255 in Milly-la-Forêt, Évry, Essonne, Île-de-France, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Geoffroy de Milly 42 und ihre Mutter Eléonore de Sancerre 37. Sie hat 1270 in Milly-la-Forêt, Évry, Essonne, Île-de-France, Frankreich Eudes de Sully III geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1286 im Alter von 31 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Marguerite de Milly la Forêt è nata il nel 1255 nel Milly-la-Forêt, Évry, Essonne, Île-de-France, Francia, sua padre, Geoffroy de Milly, aveva 42 anni e sua madre, Eléonore de Sancerre, aveva 37 anni. Lei sposato Eudes de Sully III nel 1270, nel Milly-la-Forêt, Évry, Essonne, Île-de-France, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1286, all'età di 31 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Marguerite de Milly la Forêtが1255年にフランスiレ-デ-フランスエソンevリーミリ-ラ-フォーeトで生まれた時，父Geoffroy de Millyは42歳，母Eléonore de Sancerreは37歳であった。1270年にフランスiレ-デ-フランスエソンevリーミリ-ラ-フォーeトでEudes de Sully IIIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1286年に31歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Marguerite de Milly la Forêt(이)가 1255년 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 에손 e브리 미리-라-포e트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Geoffroy de Milly(은)는 42세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Eléonore de Sancerre(은)는 37세였다. 그녀는 1270년 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 에손 e브리 미리-라-포e트에서 Eudes de Sully III(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1286년 31세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Marguerite de Milly la Forêt nasceu em 1255, em Milly-la-Forêt, Évry, Essonne, Île-de-France, França, seu pai, Geoffroy de Milly, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Eléonore de Sancerre, tinha 37 anos. Ela casou-se com Eudes de Sully III em 1270, em Milly-la-Forêt, Évry, Essonne, Île-de-France, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1286, com 31 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Marguerite de Milly la Forêt родилась в 1255 г. в местности милли-ла-форeт, eври, эссонн, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция, её отцу по имени Geoffroy de Milly было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Eléonore de Sancerre, 37. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Eudes de Sully III в 1270 г. в местности милли-ла-форeт, eври, эссонн, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1286 г. в возрасте 31 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Marguerite de Milly la Forêt nació en 1255, en Milly-la-Forêt, Évry, Essonne, Île-de-France, Francia, su papá, Geoffroy de Milly, tenía 42 años y su mamá, Eléonore de Sancerre, tenía 37 años. Se casó con Eudes de Sully III en 1270, en Milly-la-Forêt, Évry, Essonne, Île-de-France, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1286, a la edad de 31 años.
